description_long: This is a tall, slender easel constructed primarily from metal tubing, featuring a tripod base for stability. The three legs are evenly spaced and splay outward, providing a wide stance to support the vertical central post. A visible adjustment knob is present on the central shaft, suggesting the height or angle can be modified. The structure is minimalistic, with no visible canvas or board holder, and the overall finish is matte black. The easel appears lightweight and portable, suitable for temporary use in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or event spaces.
description: A tall, black metal tripod easel with a central adjustable post and no visible canvas holder. Its minimalist, sturdy design is ideal for portable urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full height, tripod leg spread, and the adjustment knob on the central post.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the depth of the tripod base and the slenderness of the central shaft.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the symmetrical tripod legs and the adjustment knob at the center.
description_view_3: Rear angled view emphasizing the tripod's spread and the uninterrupted vertical post.
